features.title: CLI Command UX
features.intent: Find mature CLIs with clear command trees, discoverable help, plugin-like extension points, and strong terminal ergonomics.

matches.name: yt-dlp
matches.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

matches.name: gemini-cli
matches.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

matches.name: fzf
matches.description: :cherry_blossom: A command-line fuzzy finder

matches.name: winget-cli
matches.description: WinGet is the Windows Package Manager. This project includes a CLI (Command Line Interface), PowerShell modules, and a COM (Component Object Model) API (Application Programming Interface).

features.title: API Test Runner
features.intent: Find projects that run API tests, collections, suites, or browser/API automation with reproducible reports.

matches.name: karate
matches.description: Test Automation Made Simple

matches.name: playwright
matches.description: Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.

matches.name: bruno
matches.description: Opensource IDE For Exploring and Testing API's (lightweight alternative to Postman/Insomnia)

matches.name: robotframework
matches.description: Generic automation framework for acceptance testing and RPA

matches.name: gauge
matches.description: Light weight cross-platform test automation

features.title: Workflow Orchestration
features.intent: Find projects that model, schedule, execute, and report multi-step workflows or automation graphs.

matches.name: prefect
matches.description: Prefect is a workflow orchestration framework for building resilient data pipelines in Python.

matches.name: n8n
matches.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

matches.name: maestro
matches.description: Maestro: Netflixs Workflow Orchestrator

matches.name: airflow
matches.description: Apache Airflow - A platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows

matches.name: FastGPT
matches.description: FastGPT is a knowledge-based platform built on the LLMs, offers a comprehensive suite of out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration, letting you easily develop and deploy complex question-answering systems without the need for extensive setup or configuration.

matches.name: activepieces
matches.description: AI Agents & MCPs & AI Workflow Automation (~400 MCP servers for AI agents) AI Automation / AI Agent with MCPs AI Workflows & AI Agents MCPs for AI Agents

matches.name: dapr
matches.description: Dapr is a portable runtime for building distributed applications across cloud and edge, combining event-driven architecture with workflow orchestration.

matches.name: inngest
matches.description: The leading workflow orchestration platform. Run stateful step functions and AI workflows on serverless, servers, or the edge.

matches.name: ComfyUI-Copilot
matches.description: An AI-powered custom node for ComfyUI designed to enhance workflow automation and provide intelligent assistance

matches.name: iflow-cli
matches.description: iFlow cli is a comprehensive command-line intelligence that embeds in your terminal, analyzes your repositories, does coding tasks, interprets your needs across contexts, and boosts efficiency by performing tasks from simple file operations to complex workflow automation.

matches.name: xyops
matches.description: A complete workflow automation and server monitoring system.

matches.name: tradingview-mcp
matches.description: AI-assisted TradingView chart analysis connect Claude Code to your TradingView Desktop for personal workflow automation

matches.name: terramate
matches.description: Open-source Infrastructure as Code (IaC) orchestration platform: GitOps workflows, orchestration, code generation, observability, drift detection, asset management, policies, Slack notifications, and more. Integrates with Terraform, OpenTofu, Terragrunt, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, BitBucket Pipelines, and any other CI/CD platform.

features.title: Evidence Diagnosis
features.intent: Find projects that turn logs, traces, reports, or execution artifacts into failure evidence and root-cause hints.

matches.name: signoz
matches.description: SigNoz is an open-source observability platform native to OpenTelemetry with logs, traces and metrics in a single application. An open-source alternative to DataDog, NewRelic, etc. . Open source Application Performance Monitoring (APM) & Observability tool

matches.name: skywalking
matches.description: APM, Application Performance Monitoring System

matches.name: grafana
matches.description: The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.

features.title: Quality Gates
features.intent: Find projects that gate releases or CI runs with quality reports, coverage, policy checks, and actionable summaries.

matches.name: sonarqube
matches.description: Continuous Inspection

matches.name: trivy
matches.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

matches.name: semgrep
matches.description: Lightweight static analysis for many languages. Find bug variants with patterns that look like source code.

matches.name: scorecard
matches.description: OpenSSF Scorecard - Security health metrics for Open Source

features.title: GitHub Radar Generation
features.intent: Find projects that continuously generate GitHub rankings, star histories, or static indexes from GitHub metadata.
